typography.notes: Outfit provides a clean, modern, slightly rounded clinical feel perfect for skincare. DM Sans ensures maximum legibility on mobile. DO NOT use Inter or generic sans for headings. Use tracking-tight for headings above 32px.

colors.notes: Medical/Clinical archetype. Stark whites, cool slate grays, and a trustworthy medical sky blue. No dark themes. No heavy gradients, use solid colors for a sterile, clean, and professional aesthetic.

visual_enhancers.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons to feel accessible and safe.
visual_enhancers.textures: Clinical cleanliness. No noise or grain. Pure white backgrounds with subtle slate borders.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Only for the sticky bottom checkout bar or sticky mobile nav (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-slate-100).

layouts.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-white shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] overflow-x-hidden relative
layouts.spacing: Generous vertical spacing (gap-8, py-12) to prevent clutter. Horizontal padding strictly px-5 or px-6.
layouts.navigation: Sticky top minimal header (Logo center, Hamburger left, Cart right).
layouts.bottom_bar: Sticky bottom CTA on product page for instant conversion.

motion.transitions: Smooth, subtle easing. 0.3s ease-out for all interactions.
motion.page_load: Fade in and slide up slightly for hero elements.
motion.interactions: Active states on buttons should scale down slightly (active:scale-95) for tactile mobile feedback.

homepage.rules: NO PRODUCT PHOTOS. Focus on clinical textures, lifestyle (mature women with healthy skin), and typography-driven value props.
sections: Hero: Text-heavy, scientific claim ('Clinically proven to reduce fine lines in 4 weeks'), backed by abstract serum texture image.
Trust Bar: 'Dermatologist Tested', 'Cruelty Free', 'Paraben Free' icons in a simple horizontal scroll.
Benefits Bento: Grid showing 'Hydration', 'Firmness', 'Glow' using abstract water splash images.
Testimonials: Clean cards with verified purchase tags.
CTA: Solid medical blue button 'Explore the Science'.
Image Gallery: Full width, square ratio (aspect-square) with snap scroll. (Product photos ARE allowed here).
Header: Title, Reviews (stars), Price (₹399 Prepaid, ₹450 COD explicitly shown).
Sticky Bottom Bar: Fixed to bottom of screen 'Add to Cart / Buy Now' always visible on scroll.
Accordion Details: Ingredients, How to Use, Clinical Results (use Shadcn Accordion).

blog_list.rules: Clean list view, large legible titles, reading time tags.

checkout_flow.rules: Simple, one-page mobile-optimized form. Large input fields (h-12 or h-14) to prevent fat-finger errors. Shadcn forms.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure primary blue against white passes AA contrast. Text must be #0F172A for high legibility.
accessibility.font_size: Base font size 16px to prevent iOS auto-zoom on inputs. Headings strictly scaled for mobile (text-3xl max).

images.description: Mature woman doing self-care routine. Use in homepage testimonials or brand story section.
Woman using jade roller. Use for blog hero or 'How to apply' section.
Macro clear cosmetic gel with air bubbles. Use as homepage hero background or clinical science section.
Blue water droplet splash. Use in hydration benefits section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly enforce mobile-first view. The root App layout should wrap content in `<div className='w-full max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-white shadow-xl relative overflow-x-hidden'>` to simulate a mobile device on desktop and provide a perfect mobile experience.
Update `tailwind.config.js` to replace Inter/Playfair with Outfit/DM Sans. Adjust the primary colors to Medical Blue.
Ensure all form inputs are `text-base` (16px) so mobile browsers do not zoom in when focused.
For the homepage, strictly DO NOT render any product bottle images. Use the provided macro texture images (gel bubbles, water splash) and lifestyle images.
Build the product page with a fixed bottom CTA that appears after the user scrolls past the main buy button.
Price logic: Clearly show ₹399 as Prepaid price and ₹450 as COD price in the selection toggles.
Use Lucide-react for all icons (clean, stroke-based clinical feel).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this by strictly following the 'Clinical Skincare' aesthetic—stark whites, precise medical blue accents, and generous whitespace.
Do not center-align body text. Left-align paragraphs for clinical readability.
Do not use dark backgrounds for containers. Use pure white (#FFF) or slate-50 (#F8FAFC).
Do not use generic emoji characters. Use Lucide icons.
Use 2x more padding than usual for an uncluttered look (e.g., p-6 or p-8 instead of p-4).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute to facilitate robust automated testing.
Do not use complete transparent background in header, overlays, or any surface that has content under it.
